title: anthyllis saharae
intro: Anthyllis saharae, also known as the Sahara kidney-vetch or kidney vetch, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Anthyllis saharae include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other renal issues due to its diuretic and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis saharae can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat kidney problems and urinary tract infections.
